name: Convert ../scv-app/scv-tasks to JS pkg/tasks

plannedActions.name: Setup pkg/tasks infrastructure (dirs, package.json, vitest config)
Convert + test TaskState module (no dependencies, 11 test lines)
Convert + test Reference module (no dependencies, 72 test lines)
Convert + test UUID utilities (uuidToFilename, uuidToBase64, shortId)
Convert + test ITaskWorld protocol (interface only, no dependencies)
Create constants module with TEST_DEFAULT (resolve circular dependency)
Convert + test WorldModel module (needs TEST_DEFAULT, 63 test lines)
Convert + test Action module (needs ITaskWorld + TEST_DEFAULT, 63 test lines)
Convert + test Task model (needs Reference, Action, ITaskWorld, TaskState, 115 test lines)
Convert + test TaskManager module (needs Task, 24 test lines)
Convert + test TaskWorld (needs Task, TaskManager, WorldModel, ITaskWorld, 499 test lines)
Integration verification (run all tests, verify file persistence)

references.text: Tests: /Users/visakha/dev/scv-app/scv-tasks/Tests/ - Swift test files to convert
Reference: pkg/nameforma - TypeScript package pattern with vitest config

summary: Port Swift scv-tasks library to TypeScript as pkg/tasks in nx-scv monorepo. Use TypeScript strict mode, ES modules (.mjs), vitest testing (following pkg/nameforma pattern). Actions ordered by dependencies. Key conversions needed: UUIDV7 library integration, MD5 hash implementation, Levenshtein distance function (convert existing Swift impl at TaskWorld.swift:373-406), TEST_DEFAULT circular dependency resolution, JSON serialization with sorted keys. Target: Node.js library only (CLI conversion is separate task T_AZzIi1STc).
